title: Create Styled Gui
description: This texturepack turns gui into Create mod style
body:
## |Beta version|

 

### Thank you all so much for 10000+ downloads in ~~curseforge~~ 💚. Now welcome to modrinth

 

 

Optifine recommended but not needed (if works with create at this version)

![gradient](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d822169d1b9a69615f7a6dc2cb55a104441aba6.png)
### About:

Hello, I present to you fans of [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) texturpack in the style of this mod.

The inspiration for this texturepack came from the orginal Create gui to which I wanted to adapt the rest of the gui from minecraft like crafting gui, smelter gui et cetera and the buttons in the pause menu.

This is the fancy version, which means it has elements in the gui created like create mod contraptions. There will still be a simplified version changing only the gui colors to the gui style from create

![gradient](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d822169d1b9a69615f7a6dc2cb55a104441aba6.png)

### Work Details:

Version 1.20 may be slightly different from 1.16.2-1.19.4

The texture pack itself is currently not finished yet, (report bugs or something to fix in curseforge) but it is available for download as beta

Texturepack has a problem with the correct location of names in the gui which will be fixed with the release of the full version.

 ![gradient](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d822169d1b9a69615f7a6dc2cb55a104441aba6.png)

### From the author:

This is my first ever texturepack so I don't have much skill. If anyone has any advice then maybe share in the comments (for now in ~~curseforge~~ since i dont have site for that).

 

PS: For future plans, there will be an animated version of this texturepack
